articles.title: The pope’s AI encyclical isn’t really about AI
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical uses AI as a lens to diagnose older problems: concentrated power, eroding democracy, and a tech elite that shapes the world to its own advantage.

articles.title: The pitch trick that helped an eSports startup raise $20M when VCs only wanted AI
articles.description: Earlier this year, Lucra Sports founder and CEO Dylan Robbins did something that no one else has ever done. And he shared several secrets on how he did it.

articles.title: ARIQO makes its Bangkok debut at SEABW, drawing industry attention
articles.description: Canton Foundation, Toss, BitGo Among Co-Hosts at Private Event; Token Launch Slated for Second Half of 2026

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in days: Apply before May 27
articles.description: The deadline to apply or nominate for Startup Battlefield 200 is May 27. This is your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100,000. Apply now.

articles.title: Coinbase CEO’s finance wishlist mirrors company’s product roadmap
articles.description: Brian Armstrong's wishlist for upgrading global finance aligns with the exchange's push into stocks, prediction markets and stablecoin payments, though some priorities remain aspirational.

articles.title: Ethereum whale opens $100M short as Vitalik Buterin vows to 'sell less ETH'
articles.description: ETH’s rebound toward the whale’s liquidation zone near $2,150 puts its short at risk of over $1 million in potential losses.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Paper losses and scrapped ETFs. What Trump Media’s 2,650 BTC transfer really means
articles.description: Digital asset treasuries (DATs) and the broader practice of building corporate Bitcoin reserves became hugely popular in 2024 and 2025, thanks in large part to the success of Strategy, whose "flywheel" many tried to replicate.

articles.title: Cyannova Capital announces global launch at its first strategic reception in Hong Kong
articles.description: Cyannova Capital (“Cyannova” or the “Company”), a New York-based investment firm, announces its inaugural investment fund, Cyannova Capital, LP, at its private industry reception held in Hong Kong.

articles.title: Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner transfers $203M in BTC to OTC desks
articles.description: A Satoshi-era Bitcoin miner moved 2,650 BTC worth about $203 million to FalconX and Cumberland, while retaining 6,000 BTC.

articles.title: PCE, jobless claims and housing data test Fed cut hopes: Crypto Week Ahead
articles.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 25.

articles.title: Bitcoin risks drop to $72K as demand metric hits 2026 lows
articles.description: Bitcoin’s weakening demand failed to absorb increased selling pressure, raising risks of a further BTC price drop toward $72,000.

articles.title: Indonesia blocks Polymarket after bets on president’s exit
articles.description: Indonesia blocked Polymarket after users bet on President Prabowo Subianto leaving office early, citing gambling concerns and expanding global scrutiny of prediction markets.

articles.title: Crypto lobby spending on Republicans far outpaces Democratic support
articles.description: The crypto lobby has spent tens of millions of dollars more on Republican candidates and elections than on Democratic lawmakers.

articles.title: BTC price to attack $80K shorts on Iran peace deal: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
articles.description: Bitcoin traders predicted a short squeeze to $80,000, but a lack of overall demand and the return of leverage sparked warnings of more liquidation events to come.

articles.title: Prometheum bets Wall Street distribution is the missing link for tokenized securities
articles.description: Crypto has solved tokenization, but not distribution and Prometheum says broker-dealers and RIAs are the key to bringing digital assets into mainstream finance.

articles.title: Influence360 launches as the first AI & data-driven Web3 KOL platform with global KOL coverage and real attribution
articles.description: Influence360 today announced the launch of its platform, introducing a new infrastructure layer for Web3 influencer marketing built around trust, data, and global execution.

articles.title: New York lawsuit tests lost property claim over dormant Bitcoin
articles.description: A New York lawsuit seeks ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, raising questions over lost crypto, private keys and property law.

articles.title: Tether, Georgia plan lari-backed stablecoin GELT under new rules
articles.description: Georgia’s central bank released stablecoin rules in March covering reserve backing, issuer documents and external auditor verification.

articles.title: 台積電帶動熊本半導體聚落，三井不動產將在台招商
articles.description: 日本三井不動產表示，台積電投資日本熊本縣後，熊本逐步形成半導體研究、測試與製造重鎮；三井不動產已與熊本縣、合志 […]
